description_long: This is a high-top sneaker with a classic Converse All Star design, featuring a canvas upper that transitions from deep red at the front to blue at the back. The shoe has cream-colored laces arranged in a standard criss-cross pattern, threaded through metal eyelets. The toe cap and sole are a pale yellow, with a distinctive Converse logo patch on the inner side of the ankle. The front of the shoe displays a stylized emblem in white on the red toe area. The overall construction suggests a combination of canvas, rubber, and possibly some synthetic materials for reinforcement. The shoe appears clean, structurally intact, and free from visible wear or damage.
description: A high-top Converse-style sneaker with a red-to-blue canvas upper, cream laces, and a pale yellow sole, featuring a visible logo patch and a stylized emblem on the toe.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cream laces, red toe cap with a white emblem, and the transition to blue at the top.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the red-to-blue gradient, cream sole, and absence of the logo patch.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the vertical cream heel stripe and the blue upper back.
description_view_3: Right side view with the Converse All Star logo patch, red-to-blue gradient, and cream sole.
attribute_logo: Circular Converse All Star logo patch on the inner ankle, white with black and red details
